_comment: Concept-gap spec for the embeddings A/B. Queries use vocabulary that does NOT appear in the code (broadcast vs publish, memoize/expire vs ttl/cache, rate-limit vs throttle). Run with: atlas eval retrieval --root playgrounds/holdout-js-eventbus --spec evals/retrieval/holdout-js-eventbus.semantic.spec.json --ab  (requires embeddings enabled + a local model installed). Lexical alone is expected to miss; hybrid should catch them — the reported lift is the gate for turning embeddings on by default.

cases.query: broadcast a notification to every listener
memoize values that expire after a while
limit how often a rapidly repeated call runs
register a handler and later cancel it
